texto: Establishing dominance early in the relationship is key. Vampire children are like human children in that they can sense weakness. They will wait for you to be busy or too distracted to realize that you’ve given them permission to feed on the pizza guy.
autor: —Siring for the Stupid: A Beginner’s Guide to Raising Newborn Vampires
